title: Negotiate a noisy supplier renewal
description: I need to renew a supplier contract in 10 days. The supplier opened with a 14% increase, but the account team is human, sometimes misreads incentives, and makes suboptimal moves about 20% of the time. I have one weaker outside option and can trade term length for price relief.

evidenceContext.label: Behavioral noise
evidenceContext.detail: The account team sometimes misreads incentives and makes suboptimal moves about 20% of the time
